instruction: Explain 8.50% interest for 12 months.
output: Bhaiya, Suryoday Bank mein 1 saal ke liye 8.50% ka byaaj mil raha hai. Matlab har 100 rupaye par 8 rupaye 50 paise ka pakka munaafa.

instruction: Tenor ka matlab samjhao Maithili mein.
output: Pahuna, 'Tenor' के अर्थ भेल जे अहाँ कते काल धरि (how long) बैंक में टका राखय चाहैत छी। जेना 12 महीना या 2 साल।

instruction: What is p.a. in Punjabi?
output: Veere, 'p.a.' da matlab hai 'Per Annum', yaani saalana viaaj. Je 8.50% p.a. likhya hai, ta saal de khatam hon te tuhanu pura viaaj milega.

instruction: Explain 'Maturity Amount' simply.
output: Bhaiya, 'Maturity Amount' wo paisa hai jo samay pura hone par aapke hath mein aayega—aapka jama kiya hua paisa + bank ka byaaj.

instruction: Suryoday Bank safe hai ya nahi?
output: Bilkul bhaiya! Ye RBI se regulated hai aur ₹5 Lakh tak ka deposit DICGC insurance ke andar safe rehta hai. Bilkul chinta mat kariye.

instruction: Nominee ke baare mein Maithili mein batao.
output: Pahuna, 'Nominee' के अर्थ भेल अहाँक बाद के हकदार। जँ अहाँक किछ भऽ जायत अछि, तऽ ई टका अहाँक नॉमिनी (घरवाला) के भेटत।

instruction: Explain 8.50% interest for 12 months.
output: Bhaiya, iska matlab hai ki agar aap 1 saal ke liye paisa jama karte hain, toh bank aapko 8.50% ka saalana byaaj dega. Har 100 rupaye par 8 rupaye 50 paise ka munaafa milega.

instruction: Tenor ka matlab samjhao Maithili mein.
output: Pahuna, 'Tenor' के अर्थ भेल जे अहाँ कते समय धरि बैंक में टका राखय चाहैत छी। जेना कि 12 महीना, 2 साल या 5 साल।

instruction: What is a Nominee? Explain in Punjabi.
output: Veere, 'Nominee' da matlab hai oh banda jisnu tuhade baad eh paise milange. Je tuhanu kujh ho janda hai, ta tuhada jama kita hoya paisa tuhade waaris nu mil jayega.

instruction: Is my money safe in a Small Finance Bank?
output: Bilkul bhaiya! Suryoday ek RBI regulated bank hai. Saath hi, DICGC scheme ke tahat aapka ₹5 Lakh tak ka deposit puri tarah insured aur safe rehta hai.

instruction: Explain 'Maturity Amount' in Maithili.
output: Pahuna, 'Maturity Amount' ओ टका भेल जे समय पूरा भेला पर अहाँकें भेटत। एहिमे अहाँक असल टका (Principal) आ बैंकक सूद (Interest) दुनू जुड़ल रहैत अछि।

instruction: What does 'p.a.' mean in an FD offer?
output: Bhaiya, 'p.a.' ka full form hota hai 'Per Annum', jiska hindi mein matlab hai 'Prati Varsh'. Ye batata hai ki aapko ek saal mein kitna byaaj milega.

instruction: Guide me through the booking process.
output: Bhaiya, FD book karna bahut saral hai: 1. Amount chuniye. 2. Tenor select kariye. 3. Nominee details bhariye. 4. Aadhaar se e-KYC kariye. Bas, booking done!

instruction: 8.50% viaaj baare dasso Punjabi vich.
output: Veere, isda matlab hai ki tuhanu saal de khatam hon te tuhade paise utte 8.50% da viaaj milega. Eh bachat karan layi vadiya rate hai.

instruction: Tax Saving FD kya hoti hai?
output: Bhaiya, Tax Saving FD 5 saal ke liye hoti hai. Isme aapko Section 80C ke tahat tax mein chhoot milti hai, lekin isse 5 saal se pehle nahi nikaal sakte.

instruction: Explain 'Cumulative vs Non-Cumulative' in simple terms.
output: Bhaiya, Cumulative matlab 'Byaaj par Byaaj' jo akhir mein milta hai. Non-cumulative matlab har mahine ya quarter mein byaaj aapke account mein aa jayega.

instruction: Explain 8.50% interest for 12 months in Hindi.
output: Bhaiya, 12 mahine ke liye 8.50% byaaj milega. Ye saal ka munaafa hai.

instruction: What is 'Tenor' in Maithili?
output: Pahuna, 'Tenor' के अर्थ भेल जे अहाँ कते काल धri टका जमा राखब।

instruction: Explain viaaj in Punjabi.
output: Veere, viaaj da matlab hai tuhade paise te milan wala fayda.

instruction: Is my money safe? (Hindi)
output: Bhaiya, RBI ke niyam anusar aapka 5 lakh tak ka paisa bilkul surakshit hai.

instruction: Explain Maturity in Maithili.
output: Pahuna, samay pura bhela par jo paisa bhetat, ohi maturity amount thik.

instruction: What is p.a. in Punjabi?
output: Veere, 'p.a.' da matlab hai saalana viaaj, jo har saal de hisab naal milde.

instruction: Guide me to book FD in Hindi.
output: Bhaiya, pehle amount chuniye, fir samay, aur KYC karke booking kariye.

instruction: Nominee explain in Maithili.
output: Pahuna, Nominee ओ व्यक्ति छथि जे अहाँक बाद टकाक अधिकारी होताह।

instruction: Tax saving FD kya hai? (Hindi)
output: Bhaiya, 5 saal ki FD jisme 80C ke tahat tax ki chhoot milti hai.

instruction: Suryoday bank interest rate in Punjabi.
output: Veere, Suryoday bank tuhanu 8.50% tak da vadiya viaaj de reha hai.

instruction: Explain 8.50% interest for 12 months in Hindi.
output: Bhaiya, 12 mahine ke liye 8.50% byaaj milega. Ye saal ka munaafa hai.

instruction: What is 'Tenor' in Maithili?
output: Pahuna, 'Tenor' के अर्थ भेल जे अहाँ कते काल धri टका जमा राखब।

instruction: Explain viaaj in Punjabi.
output: Veere, viaaj da matlab hai tuhade paise te milan wala fayda.

output: Bhaiya, RBI ke niyam anusar aapka 5 lakh tak ka paisa bilkul surakshit hai.

output: Pahuna, samay pura bhela par jo paisa bhetat, ohi maturity amount thik.

output: Veere, 'p.a.' da matlab hai saalana viaaj, jo har saal de hisab naal milde.

output: Bhaiya, pehle amount chuniye, fir samay, aur KYC karke booking kariye.

output: Pahuna, Nominee ओ व्यक्ति छथि जे अहाँक बाद टकाक अधिकारी होताह।

output: Bhaiya, 5 saal ki FD jisme 80C ke tahat tax ki chhoot milti hai.

instruction: Suryoday bank interest rate in Punjabi.
output: Veere, Suryoday bank tuhanu 8.50% tak da vadiya viaaj de reha hai.

instruction: Explain 8.50% interest for 12 months.
output: Bhaiya, Suryoday Bankwa mein 1 saal ke liye 8.50% byaaj mil raha hai. Har 100 rupaye par 8 rupaye 50 paise ka pakka munaafa ho jaayi.

instruction: Tenor ka matlab samjhao Maithili mein.
output: Pahuna, 'Tenor' के अर्थ भेल जे अहाँ कते समय धरि बैंक में टका राखय चाहैत छी। जेना कि 12 महीना या 2 साल।

output: Veere, 'Nominee' da matlab hai oh banda jisnu tuhade baad eh paise milange. Je tuhanu kujh ho janda hai, ta tuhada waaris (Nominee) nu paisa mil jayega.

instruction: Suryoday Bank safe hai ya nahi?
output: Bilkul bhaiya! Ye RBI se regulated hai aur ₹5 Lakh tak ka deposit insurance ke andar safe rehta hai. Bilkul chinta mati kari.

instruction: Explain Maturity Amount in Maithili.
output: Pahuna, 'Maturity Amount' ओ टका भेल जे समय पूरा भेला पर अहाँकें भेटत। एहिमे असल टका आ सूद दुनू जुड़ल रहैत अछि।

instruction: What is p.a. in Punjabi?
output: Veere, 'p.a.' da matlab hai 'Per Annum', yaani saalana viaaj. Eh dasda hai ki tuhanu ik saal vich kinna viaaj milega.

instruction: Guide me to book FD.
output: Bhaiya, FD book karna bahut saral hai: Amount chuniye, Samay select kariye, Nominee details bhariye aur e-KYC kariye. Bas, booking done!

instruction: 8.50% viaaj baare dasso Punjabi vich.
output: Veere, isda matlab hai ki tuhanu saal de khatam hon te tuhade paise utte 8.50% da viaaj milega. Eh bachat karan layi vadiya rate hai.

instruction: Tax Saving FD kya hoti hai?
output: Bhaiya, Tax Saving FD 5 saal ke liye hoti hai. Isme Section 80C ke tahat tax mein chhoot milti hai, par 5 saal se pehle paisa nahi nikal sakte.

instruction: Explain Cumulative in simple terms.
output: Bhaiya, Cumulative matlab 'Byaaj par Byaaj'. Paisa badhta rahega aur akhir mein aapko ek bada amount milega.

instruction: Interestwa kitna milega 2 saal mein?
output: Bhaiya, 2 saal ke liye rate thoda alag ho sake la, lekin munaafa badhiya rahi. Hum check karke batawat hain.

instruction: Lock-in period kya hota hai?
output: Bhaiya, lock-in matlab wo samay jisme aap paisa nahi nikal sakte. Tax saving FD mein ye 5 saal ka hota hai.

instruction: Taka kab bhetat? (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, जखन अहाँक समय (Tenor) पूरा भऽ जायत, तखन टका अहाँक खाता में आबि जायत।

instruction: Senior Citizen rate kya hai?
output: Bhaiya, buzurgon ke liye bank 0.50% extra byaaj deta hai. Agar normal 8.50% hai toh unhe 9.00% milega.

instruction: FD todne par penalty lagegi?
output: Haan bhaiya, agar samay se pehle paisa nikalenge toh bank thoda charge (penalty) kaat leta hai.

instruction: Minimum kitna jama kar sakte hain?
output: Bhaiya, aap ₹1,000 se bhi FD shuru kar sakte hain. Chote amount se shuru karna badhiya rahta hai.

instruction: Viaaj har mahine mil sakda hai? (Punjabi)
output: Haan veere, tusi 'Monthly Payout' option chun sakde ho, pher viaaj har mahine tuhade account vich aayega.

instruction: Auto-renewal kya hota hai?
output: Bhaiya, iska matlab hai ki FD khatam hone par bank use apne aap agle saal ke liye renew kar dega agar aap nahi rokenge.

instruction: Aadhaar card zaroori hai?
output: Pahuna, e-KYC लेल आधार कार्ड आ पैन कार्ड बहुत ज़रूरी अछि। एकर बिना खाता नहि खुलत।

instruction: DICGC insurance kya hai?
output: Bhaiya, ye sarkari guarantee hai jo aapke ₹5 lakh tak ke deposit ko bank doobne par bhi surakshit rakhti hai.

instruction: Premature closure explain in Punjabi.
output: Veere, isda matlab hai samay ton pehla FD band karna. Is vich thoda nuksan (penalty) ho sakda hai.

instruction: Joint account mein FD ho sakti hai?
output: Bhaiya, bilkul! Aap apni patni ya kisi family member ke saath milkar joint FD khol sakte hain.

instruction: FD vs Savings account interest?
output: Bhaiya, Savings account mein 3-4% milta hai, par FD mein 8.50% tak. FD mein paisa zyada tezi se badhta hai.

instruction: Tractor ke liye saving karni hai, kaunsi FD lu?
output: Bhaiya, agar tractor 2 saal baad lena hai, toh 24 mahine ki FD kariye. Rate bhi badhiya milega aur paisa safe rahega.

instruction: Shaadi ke liye best plan? (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, जँ कन्याक विवाह लेल जमा करय चाहैत छी, तऽ 5 सालक Tax Saver FD निक रहत।

instruction: Emergency fund ke liye FD?
output: Bhaiya, emergency ke liye kam samay ki FD (6-12 mahine) rakhiye taki zaroorat padne par turant nikal sakein.

instruction: Kya interest rate badh sakta hai?
output: Bhaiya, FD ka rate fix hota hai. Ek baar book kar liya toh wahi rate milega chahe market niche gir jaye.

instruction: Offline bank jana padega?
output: Nahi bhaiya, hamare app se aap ghar baithe terminal ya mobile se booking kar sakte hain.

instruction: Compound viaaj dasso (Punjabi).
output: Veere, compound viaaj matlab 'viaaj te viaaj'. Tuhada munaafa har saal mool dhan vich judda jayega.

instruction: Ek saal mein ₹1 lakh ka kitna hoga?
output: Bhaiya, 8.50% ke hisab se 1 saal baad aapko ₹1,08,500 milenge. ₹8,500 ka saaf munaafa!

instruction: Quarterly payout kya hai?
output: Bhaiya, isme har 3 mahine mein byaaj ka paisa aapke account mein aa jata hai. Kharch nikalne ke liye badhiya hai.

instruction: FD certificate milega?
output: Pahuna, booking के बाद अहाँकें digital certificate भेटत, जे अहाँ download कऽ सकैत छी।

instruction: Nominee change kar sakte hain?
output: Haan bhaiya, aap kabhi bhi bank jaakar ya app se apna nominee badal sakte hain.

instruction: Partial withdrawal allowed hai?
output: Kuch banks mein allowed hota hai bhaiya, lekin zyada tar mein puri FD todni padti hai.

instruction: TDS kitna kategi?
output: Bhaiya, agar saal ka byaaj ₹40,000 se zyada hai, toh bank 10% TDS kaat leta hai.

instruction: Form 15G/15H kya hai?
output: Bhaiya, agar aapki total income tax limit se kam hai, toh ye form bharkar aap TDS bachwa sakte hain.

instruction: What if bank goes bust?
output: Chinta mat kijiye bhaiya, Suryoday SFB ek schedule bank hai aur sarkari insurance se cover hai.

instruction: Mobile number link hona zaroori hai?
output: Haan bhaiya, OTP ke liye mobile number link hona bahut zaroori hai.

instruction: Kudarati munaafa ki hunda hai? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, munaafa matlab oh vadh paisa jo bank tuhadi bachat utte dinda hai.

instruction: Final booking confirm kaise hogi?
output: Bhaiya, OTP dalte hi screen par 'Success' ka message aa jayega aur aapka paisa invest ho jayega.

instruction: Khichdi mele ke liye bachat karni hai, kaunsi FD lu?
output: Bhaiya, Khichdi mela mein kharch ke liye 6 mahine ki FD sahi rahi. Mele tak paisa badh jaayi aur munaafa bhi mil jaayi.

instruction: Mehangai (Inflation) se paisa kaise bachayein?
output: Bhaiya, agar mehangai 6% hai aur FD 8.5% de rahi hai, toh aapka paisa asal mein 2.5% badh raha hai. Khali account mein rakhenge toh paisa ghat jayega.

instruction: Kise fraud call se kaise bachein? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, kadi vi apna OTP ya Password phone te na dasso. Bank kadi vi tuhade ton eh details nahi mangda. Satark raho!

instruction: FD par loan mil sakta hai?
output: Bhaiya, bilkul! Agar turant paise ki zaroorat hai toh FD todne ki jagah us par 90% tak loan le sakte hain. Byaaj bhi kam lagega.

instruction: Online FD kholne mein darr lag raha hai. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, डराउ नहि। ई एकदम सुरक्षित अछि। अहाँक मोबाइल पर OTP आबय छै आ बैंकक रसीद तुरंत भेट जायत।

instruction: What is the 'Rule of 72' in FD terms?
output: Bhaiya, 72 ko interest rate se divide kariye. Agar rate 9% hai, toh 72/9 = 8 saal mein aapka paisa double ho jayega.

instruction: Recurring Deposit (RD) vs FD mein kya fark hai?
output: Bhaiya, RD mein har mahine thoda-thoda jama karte hain, par FD mein sara paisa ek saath. FD mein byaaj zyada milta hai.

instruction: Nominee minor (baccha) ho sakta hai?
output: Haan bhaiya, baccha bhi nominee ho sakta hai, bas uske saath ek 'Guardian' ka naam dena padega.

instruction: Kheti de paise kithe invest karaan? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, fasal vechan ton baad jo paise aaye ne, ohna di 1-2 saal di FD kar lo. Agli bijei (sowing) tak vadiya viaaj mil jayega.

instruction: Post Office FD vs Bank FD? (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, Post Office सुरक्षित अछि, मुदा Suryoday Bank जेका Small Finance Bank बेसी सूद (Interest) दैत अछि।

instruction: FD interest par tax kab lagta hai?
output: Bhaiya, jab saal ka kul byaaj ₹40,000 se upar nikal jata hai, tab bank TDS kaatna shuru karta hai.

instruction: Sweep-in facility kya hoti hai?
output: Bhaiya, ye savings account aur FD ka mix hai. Jab account mein zyada paisa hota hai, wo apne aap FD ban jata hai.

instruction: Ghar ki marammat ke liye saving plan.
output: Bhaiya, ghar banwane mein waqt hai toh 3 saal ki FD best hai. Paisa surakshit rahega aur rate bhi high milega.

instruction: Can I have multiple FDs in same bank?
output: Bhaiya, aap jitni chahein utni FD khol sakte hain—alag-alag goals (shaadi, padhai, emergency) ke liye.

instruction: FD maturity ke baad bank kya karta hai?
output: Bhaiya, agar aapne auto-renew nahi chuna hai, toh paisa byaaj ke saath seedha aapke savings account mein aa jayega.

instruction: Zero-balance account mein FD khul jayegi?
output: Haan bhaiya, FD kholne ke liye minimum balance ki shart nahi hoti, bas deposit amount chahiye hota hai.

instruction: Mitti (Gold) vs FD investment? (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, सोनाक दाम ऊपर-नीचा होइत रहैत अछि, मुदा FD में अहाँकें फिक्स मुनाफाक गारंटी रहैत अछि।

instruction: FD receipt khone par kya karein?
output: Chinta mat kariye bhaiya, online app se duplicate nikal jayegi ya bank mein application dekar naya mil jayega.

instruction: Re-investment plan kya hota hai?
output: Bhaiya, isme byaaj ko kharch karne ki jagah wapas FD mein daal diya jata hai taki 'Compound Interest' ka fayda mile.

instruction: Bank doob gaya toh kya hoga?
output: Bhaiya, RBI ki guarantee hai. ₹5 lakh tak ka har paisa vishwas ke saath insured hai.

instruction: Interest rate vs Tenor graph samjhao.
output: Bhaiya, aksar zyada samay (Tenor) ke liye bank zyada byaaj deta hai. Isliye lambi awdhi ki FD behtar hoti hai.

instruction: Senior Citizen card zaroori hai extra rate ke liye?
output: Nahi bhaiya, bas PAN card par janm tithi (Date of Birth) se bank apne aap rate badha deta hai.

instruction: Beti ki padhai ke liye FD plan. (Punjabi)
output: Veere, beti de future layi 5-10 saal di FD sab ton vadiya hai. Padhai de kharch layi kafi madad mil jayegi.

instruction: KYC update kaise karein?
output: Bhaiya, bas Aadhaar aur ek selfie se app par hi e-KYC ho jayegi. Bank jaane ki zaroorat nahi.

instruction: Corporate FD vs Bank FD?
output: Bhaiya, Corporate FD mein byaaj zyada hota hai par risk bhi zyada. Bank FD hamesha zyada surakshit hoti hai.

instruction: FD par nominee badalna hai. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, अहाँ कखनो ऐप कऽ माध्यम सं Nominee कऽ नाम बदलि सकैत छी। ई बहुत सरल अछि।

instruction: What is 'Floating Rate' FD?
output: Bhaiya, isme interest rate market ke hisab se upar-neeche hota rehta hai. Fixed rate mein jo tay hua wahi milta hai.

instruction: Short-term bachat ke liye options?
output: Bhaiya, 7 din se lekar 6 mahine tak ki 'Short-term FD' hoti hai. Turant paise ke liye ye best hai.

instruction: Can NRI open FD in India?
output: Haan bhaiya, NRIs NRE ya NRO account ke zariye India mein high-interest FD khol sakte hain.

instruction: FD interest calculation frequency?
output: Bhaiya, bank zyada tar 'Quarterly Compounding' karta hai, yani har 3 mahine mein byaaj mool-dhan mein jud jata hai.

instruction: Pensioners ke liye monthly income kaise banayein?
output: Bhaiya, aap FD karwaiye aur 'Monthly Payout' option chuniye. Har mahine fixed byaaj aapke kharch ke liye aata rahega.

instruction: Mobile app se FD kaise manage karein?
output: Bhaiya, hamare app mein 'My Deposits' section hai. Wahan se aap byaaj, maturity date aur certificate dekh sakte hain.

instruction: Step-up FD kya hoti hai?
output: Isme har kuch mahino mein interest rate thoda-thoda badhta rehta hai. Ye unke liye hai jo lambe waqt tak tikna chahte hain.

instruction: PAN card nahi hai toh kya karein?
output: Bhaiya, PAN ke bina TDS 20% kategi. Isliye Form 60 bharna padega, par PAN banwana hi sahi rahega.

instruction: Weekend pe FD khul sakti hai?
output: Haan bhaiya! App par 24 ghante, saato din kabhi bhi FD book ki ja sakti hai, chahe bank band ho.

instruction: FD par overdraft (OD) facility?
output: Bhaiya, ye loan jaisa hi hai. Aap apni FD ko security rakh kar ek limit le sakte hain aur sirf use kiye paise par byaaj dena hoga.

instruction: Premature withdrawal charges kitne hote hain?
output: Aksar 0.5% se 1% tak ka byaaj bank kaat leta hai agar aap samay se pehle paisa nikalte hain.

instruction: Mithila ke lok-parv ke liye saving. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, सामा-चकेवा या छठि लेल अहाँ पहिने सं 'Short-term FD' में टका जोगा कऽ सकैत छी।

instruction: Interest rate cycle kya hai?
output: Bhaiya, jab RBI rates badhata hai, tab FD rates bhi badhte hain. Abhi rates peak par hain, invest karne ka sahi waqt hai.

instruction: How to verify bank's authenticity?
output: Bhaiya, RBI ki website par 'Scheduled Commercial Banks' ki list check kijiye. Suryoday SFB wahan listed aur certified hai.

instruction: Bhaiya, FD mein 'Nomination' zaroori hai ka?
output: Ekdum bhaiya! Nomination bahut zaroori hai. Bhagwan na kare agar aapko kuch ho jaye, toh aapka jama kiya hua paisa bina kachahri ke chakkar kaate aapke parivaar ko mil jayega.

instruction: Kheti de munaafe nu kithay saunpiye? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, fasal di kamayi nu ghar vich na rakho. 1-2 saal di FD kar lo, viaaj vi vadiya milega te agli bijei (sowing) de kharch layi paise vi jud jange.

instruction: Mithila mein bitiya ke shaadi ke liye bachat. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, bitiya ke vivah lel 5 saal ke Tax Saver FD sabse nik achi. Paisa surakshit rahet aur samay par munaafa bhet jayet.

instruction: Kya FD par TDS bachane ka koi tarika hai?
output: Haan bhaiya! Agar aapki total income tax limit se kam hai, toh aap bank mein 'Form 15G' (ya buzurgon ke liye 15H) jama kar sakte hain. Bank TDS nahi katega.

instruction: FD vs Sona (Gold) mein se kya chunoon?
output: Bhaiya, sona ka daam upar-neeche hota rehta hai, lekin FD mein aapko pehle din se pata hota hai ki ant mein kitna paisa milega. Yeh ekdum pakki kamayi hai.

instruction: Lock-in period da ki matlab hai? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, 'Lock-in' da matlab hai oh sama jis vich tusi paise nahi nikal sakde. Khaas karke Tax Saver FD vich 5 saal tak paise lock ho jande ne.

instruction: Bankwa doob gaya toh humara paisa ka kya hoga?
output: Chinta mati kari bhaiya! Har bank DICGC scheme ke andar aata hai. Agar bank ko kuch hota bhi hai, toh sarkaar aapko ₹5 lakh tak ki guarantee deti hai.

instruction: Panch saal ki FD mein byaaj kitna badh jayega?
output: Bhaiya, jitne lambe samay ke liye paisa chhodenge, utna 'Byaaj par Byaaj' milega. 5 saal mein compounding ka asar bahut zyada hota hai.

instruction: Taka nikalay mein kete penalty lagat? (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, jahan samay se pahine taka nikalay chahay chhi, ta bank 0.5% se 1% tak ke jurmana (penalty) kaat leet achi.

instruction: Kya hum do log milkar FD khol sakte hain?
output: Ji bhaiya, aap 'Joint Account' khol sakte hain. Isme do log (jaise pati-patni) milkar malik hote hain aur dono mein se koi bhi maturity par paisa le sakta hai.

instruction: Monthly Payout aur Cumulative mein kya fark hai?
output: Bhaiya, Monthly Payout unke liye hai jinhe har mahine kharch chahiye. Cumulative unke liye hai jo chahte hain ki unka paisa badhta rahe aur akhir mein ek badi rakam mile.

instruction: Mobile se FD kholna surakshit hai ka?
output: Ekdum bhaiya! Hamara app bank ke level ki security use karta hai. Sabka account OTP se surakshit hai, bina aapki marzi ke ek paisa nahi hilega.

instruction: Senior Citizen card zaroori hai extra byaaj ke liye?
output: Nahi bhaiya, card ki zaroorat nahi hai. Aapka Aadhaar Card hi kafi hai, bank aapki umar dekh kar apne aap extra byaaj (rates) laga dega.

instruction: Form 15G kitni baar bharna padta hai?
output: Bhaiya, har naye saal (Financial Year) ki shuruat mein aapko ek baar ye form bharna hota hai taki bank TDS na kaate.

instruction: Achanak paise ki zaroorat pad jaye toh kya karein?
output: Bhaiya, aap FD ko beech mein tod sakte hain, ya phir FD ke badle loan le sakte hain. Loan lena behtar hai kyunki aapki savings chalti rehti hai.

instruction: FD par kitna loan mil sakta hai?
output: Bhaiya, aap apni jama rakam ka lagbhag 90% tak loan le sakte hain. Interest rate bhi baaki loan se kam hota hai.

instruction: Tractor leel taka joga karay ke achi. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, agar tractor 2 saal baad lenay ke achi, ta 24 mahine ke FD karu. Byaaj darr badhiya bhetat aur taka surakshit rahet.

instruction: Recurring Deposit (RD) ki hundi hai? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, RD vich tusi har mahine thoda-thoda karke paise jama karde ho. Eh ohna layi vadiya hai jo iko vaari moti rakam nahi jama kar sakde.

instruction: KYC update karne ke liye bank jana padega?
output: Nahi bhaiya, aap hamare app se ghar baithe hi Video-KYC ya Aadhaar-OTP ke zariye process pura kar sakte hain.

instruction: Kya interest rate badh raha hai market mein?
output: Ji bhaiya, abhi rates peak par hain. Is waqt FD book karna bahut samajhdaari hai kyunki baad mein rates gir sakte hain.

instruction: Form 60 kab bhara jata hai?
output: Agar aapke paas PAN card nahi hai bhaiya, toh aap Form 60 bharkar FD shuru kar sakte hain, par PAN banwana zyada faydemand rehta hai.

instruction: Step-up FD ka kya fayda hai?
output: Bhaiya, isme samay ke saath byaaj ka rate thoda-thoda badhta rehta hai. Ye unke liye hai jo lambe samay tak invest rehna chahte hain.

instruction: Kya FD transfer ho sakti hai kisi aur bank mein?
output: Nahi bhaiya, FD transfer nahi hoti. Aapko purani FD band karke naye bank mein khulwani padegi.

instruction: Auto-renewal ka option kab chunna chahiye?
output: Agar aapko turant paise ki zaroorat nahi hai, toh auto-renewal sahi hai. Bank maturity par apne aap naye rate par FD shuru kar dega.

instruction: FD receipt khoti (khona) jaye ta ki hoyega? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, fikar na karo! Online digital receipt hamesha app vich rehndi hai. Tusi kadi vi download kar sakde ho.

instruction: Short-term FD kitne din ki ho sakti hai?
output: Bhaiya, FD kam se kam 7 din ki bhi ho sakti hai. Chote samay ke liye bachat karne ka ye bahut badhiya rasta hai.

instruction: Income Tax chhoot (Exemption) kitni milti hai?
output: Bhaiya, 5 saal wali FD mein aap ₹1.5 lakh tak ki tax chhoot pa sakte hain Section 80C ke andar.

instruction: Maturity amount kaise calculate karein?
output: Bhaiya, hamara system apne aap calculation karke bata deta hai. Aap bas amount aur samay daliye, result aapke samne hoga.

instruction: NRI log bhi FD khol sakte hain?
output: Ji haan! NRI log NRE ya NRO accounts ke zariye India mein invest kar sakte hain aur yahan ke high interest rates ka fayda le sakte hain.

instruction: Chhath pooja ke kharch ke liye saving. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, Chhath ke kharch lel 6 mahine ke FD karu. Pooja tak taka badh jayet aur poora kharch nikal jayet.

instruction: Floating rate FD kya hota hai?
output: Bhaiya, isme interest rate market ke hisaab se upar-neeche hota hai. Agar market rate badhega toh aapka byaaj bhi badh jayega.

instruction: Kya ek bank mein kitni bhi FD ho sakti hai?
output: Ji bhaiya, limit ki koi baat nahi hai. Aap alag-alag kamo ke liye jitni chahein utni FD khol sakte hain.

instruction: Weekend pe booking ho jayegi ka?
output: Bilkul bhaiya! App par 24 ghante service chalu hai. Sunday ho ya Saturday, aap kabhi bhi FD book kar sakte hain.

instruction: FD certificate download nahi ho raha.
output: Bhaiya, ek baar internet check kijiye ya 'Refresh' kariye. Agar phir bhi na ho toh customer support se turant baat kariye.

instruction: TDS kitne percent kat-ta hai?
output: Bhaiya, agar PAN card link hai toh 10% TDS kat-ta hai. Agar link nahi hai, toh 20% tak kat sakta hai.

instruction: Partial withdrawal ki suvidha hai?
output: Kuch banks mein 'Sweep-in' facility hoti hai jisme aap thoda paisa nikal sakte hain aur baki par byaaj milta rehta hai.

instruction: Bank interest rate kitni baar badalta hai?
output: Bhaiya, ye RBI ki policies par nirbhar karta hai. Aksar har 3-4 mahine mein banks apne rates review karte hain.

instruction: Ghar ki marammat ke liye paise joga kerna hai. (Punjabi)
output: Veere, ghar de kam layi 2 saal di FD sab ton vadiya hai. Paisa jud jayega te ghar vi sohni tarah ban jayega.

instruction: Kya zero balance account se FD link ho jayegi?
output: Haan bhaiya, FD ke liye account balance ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Bas jo paisa aap invest karna chahte hain, wo hona chahiye.

instruction: Final booking confirm ho gayi kaise pata chalega?
output: Bhaiya, jaise hi screen par 'Success' dikhega aur aapko SMS milega, samajh lijiye aapki bachat shuru ho gayi!

instruction: Bhaiya, FD mein 'Nomination' zaroori hai ka?
output: Ekdum bhaiya! Nomination bahut zaroori hai. Bhagwan na kare agar aapko kuch ho jaye, toh aapka jama kiya hua paisa bina kachahri ke chakkar kaate aapke parivaar ko mil jayega.

instruction: Kheti de munaafe nu kithay saunpiye? (Punjabi)
output: Veere, fasal di kamayi nu ghar vich na rakho. 1-2 saal di FD kar lo, viaaj vi vadiya milega te agli bijei (sowing) de kharch layi paise vi jud jange.

instruction: Mithila mein bitiya ke shaadi ke liye bachat. (Maithili)
output: Pahuna, bitiya ke vivah lel 5 saal ke Tax Saver FD sabse nik achi. Paisa surakshit rahet aur samay par munaafa bhet jayet.

instruction: Kya FD par TDS bachane ka koi tarika hai?
output: Haan bhaiya! Agar aapki total income tax limit se kam hai, toh aap bank mein 'Form 15G' (ya buzurgon ke liye 15H) jama kar sakte hain. Bank TDS nahi katega.
